name: local-llm-sibling-skill-routing
prompt: Advisory classification only. Do not use tools, do not run commands, do not start agents, do not edit files, and do not use network. A user says: I need to find where private DNS or Cloudflare authority is documented, then do a read-only health or inventory check only if appropriate. In your final answer, explain which sibling skill owns each phase and include the exact phrases `docs-lookup`, `infra-ops`, and `read-only`.
config_toml:
model_provider = "lmstudio"
model_max_output_tokens = 1200

[model_providers.lmstudio]
name = "LM Studio"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1"
wire_api = "chat"
